name: deepseek_v3_1_terminus
_comment_mla: Multi-head Latent Attention (DSv3 family). Same MLA dimensions as DeepSeek-R1 / V3.x family. n_kv is the canonical n_q value but is ignored when mla is present.
_comment_moe: moe is null in this dense reference config — DSv3.1-Terminus production weights are MoE-shaped; this entry models only the dense layer slice for shape-only experiments.
